codeReview.summary: Reviewed the original failing feature together with fix commit 08beeb4. The fix addresses both prior blocking issues: nearest directory REVIEW.md guidance is now resolved per changed path and threaded into assembled changes/downstream review requests, and ai-review.yaml parsing now surfaces unknown-field and validation warnings through loader results instead of silently dropping them.

summary: Pass. The rerun-after-fixes commit threads per-path nearest REVIEW.md instructions end-to-end via TrustedRules.ReviewForPath into each assembled change/request, and strict ai-review.yaml warnings are surfaced by ParseAIReviewConfig and propagated from Loader.Load. Targeted regressions in internal/rules, internal/context, and internal/llm cover the original failures and the downstream request path.
